'''Roth''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] for the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:Cptroth1.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Captain Roth during her time on Rori]]
Roth was a [[Zabrak/Legends|Zabrak]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], which was unusual at the time considering most of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] consisted of [[Human/Legends|Human]] males. She wore [[Crusader Mark III armor|Mark III]] [[Crusader armor]] during her [[Time/Legends|time]] on [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo's]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Rori/Legends|Rori]].

Roth participated in the [[Battle of Restuss]], where she directed the destruction of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] troopers and [[Rebel elite commando/Legends|Rebel Elite Commandos]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Roth was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
